result: The sexual orientation variables have been cleaned and harmonised across waves. Data from sweeps 6 (age 19), 7 (age 20), 8, and 9 (age 32) were processed using the specified missing-value mappings (e.g., -97 and -100 to -9). A consolidated `sexual_orientation` variable was created using a most-recent-valid-first approach, and age-specific variables (`sexual_orientation_19`, `sexual_orientation_20`, `sexual_orientation_w8`, `sexual_orientation_32`) were retained. The final dataset, containing only the ID and these derived variables as labelled factors, was saved to `data/output/cleaned_data.csv`.
